frameworks.name: structural equation modeling
frameworks.one_line: Latent-variable model whose parameter estimates are scrutinized for uniqueness.

frameworks.name: fungible parameter estimation
frameworks.one_line: Extends Waller's fungible regression coefficients to SEM contexts.

core_question: Can distinct alternative parameter estimates yield nearly identical SEM fit, undermining substantive interpretation of optimal estimates?
key_assumptions: Optimal estimates are uniquely interpretable only if no near-equivalent alternative solutions exist
Model fit is the principal criterion for parameter admissibility
manipulations: Computed alternative (fungible) parameter sets constrained to a slightly worse fit than the optimum
Applied the method across three illustrative SEM applications
key_findings: Fungible solutions exist that match the optimal fit to within a small tolerance
Across illustrations, fungible estimates can diverge markedly from optimal estimates
interpretations: When fungible estimates differ greatly from optimal estimates, substantive interpretation of the optimum is called into question
